overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a run-down urban residential area in Night City. The player moves from a debris-strewn street under an elevated railway structure, turns into a dirt lot filled with garbage piles, and approaches a street vendor with a barrel fire. The environment features dystopian architecture with yellow residential buildings, scattered trash, and holographic advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking down a narrow urban street flanked by yellow residential buildings. The camera moves forward past concrete benches and scattered trash, with an elevated railway structure looming ahead. A woman in a purple top walks past on the left, and palm trees are visible between the buildings under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive elevated railway structure, transitioning from open street to a sheltered space. At around 20 seconds, the perspective turns right onto a dirt path lined with large piles of garbage bags. A circular advertising tower with holographic displays becomes visible, and the blue water tower appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned dirt lot with garbage piles and industrial backdrop

events.description: ground surface changes from asphalt to dry dirt with sparse grass patches

agents.ego_description: walking through an open dirt area past large garbage piles toward industrial buildings in the distance

entered.detail: derelict multi-story buildings with broken windows and industrial piping
yellow wall with blue and black graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera traverses a wide-open dirt lot filled with sparse dry grass and large piles of blue and black garbage bags. The environment feels abandoned and post-industrial, with the blue water tower now visible to the left and derelict buildings ahead. The elevated railway structure curves around to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor setup with barrel fire under building awning

agents.ego_description: slowing down to approach a street vendor sitting by a fire pit under a colorful umbrella

metal barrel with active flames providing heat and light

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street vendor setup under a red and yellow umbrella. A man sits on a stool next to a burning barrel fire with a white lounge chair nearby. The scene is more intimate and sheltered compared to the open lot, with the vendor looking up as the camera slows down and stops near the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow urban residential street into a desolate, garbage-strewn lot that culminates at a small street vendor's station. It begins by moving past yellow buildings and concrete benches under an overcast sky, passing a woman in purple before the perspective glides beneath the shadow of a massive elevated railway structure. As the camera turns right, the open street transitions into a dirt path lined with towering piles of garbage bags, revealing a holographic advertising tower and a distant blue water tower. The scene then expands across a wide, post-industrial lot of dry grass and derelict buildings, with the railway structure curving away to the side. Finally, the camera approaches a sheltered area under a red and yellow umbrella, slowing to a stop beside a man sitting by a burning barrel fire.
